Snugged.Shop is a fashion-only ecommerce store for India.

Allowed categories include thrift clothes, new and pre-owned fashion clothes, jewellery, bags, shoes, watches, belts, sunglasses, fashion accessories, one-of-one fashion pieces, and AI try-on enabled fashion items.

The store does not sell vegetables, hydroponics products, 3D printed toys, pottery, food products, or non-fashion subscriptions.

Canonical domain: https://snugged.shop
Support model: WhatsApp-first support and order notifications.
Checkout model: guest browsing, local cart and wishlist, account creation only during checkout phone OTP.
